name: Elm Ridge Implant and Family Dentistry

doctors.name: Jeff Muszynski, DDS
doctors.dentalSchool: University of Oklahoma College of Dentistry

doctors.name: Kayla Muszynski, DDS
doctors.dentalSchool: University of Oklahoma College of Dentistry

inHouseScopePrecision.boneGrafting: socket preservation bone grafting; broader ridge augmentation, block grafting, vertical grafting, and staged complex graft reconstruction may require referral
inHouseScopePrecision.sinusLift: limited sinus lift/sinus bump with implant placement when appropriate; staged sinus lifts requiring separate grafting and healing are not routine in-house scope
inHouseScopePrecision.sleepApnea: take-home sleep studies are available, recorded data is sent to a sleep physician for official diagnosis, and physician diagnosis is required before appliance delivery
inHouseScopePrecision.beforeAndAfter: no standalone public before-and-after page; before-and-after imagery is kept within cosmetic dentistry and relevant sections
